# ==========================================
# 杀戮尖塔2自动素描机器人 - 本地配置文件
# ==========================================

[线条设置]
threshold = 100
min_len = 10

[绘制区域]
left_margin = 16
right_margin = 19
top_margin = 9
bottom_margin = 7

[绘制参数]
drag_step = 5
delay = 0.02
mouse_btn = right
auto_align = True
[快捷键]
start = F9
pause = F8
stop = F10


[迷雾设置]
mist_margin = 40
mist_spacing = 3
mist_step = 20
mist_scroll = 1200
